file.content:
# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement advanced filtering capabilities for racquet exploration with multi-dimensional range controls, brand filtering, and dynamic search
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx (new)
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx (new) 
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Advanced Filtering System with:
- Multi-dimensional range sliders (weight, head size, power, control, etc.)
- Brand multi-select with search
- Dynamic search with autocomplete
- Filter persistence and URL state management
- Real-time results updating

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Range sliders for numeric properties (weight, head size, ratings)
- [ ] Multi-select brand filter with search functionality
- [ ] Dynamic text search with autocomplete suggestions
- [ ] Filter state management with custom hook
- [ ] Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- [ ] URL state persistence for filters
- [ ] Clear/reset filters functionality

## After Completion
Next task will be: "Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis"

## Previous Task: ✅ Implement Three.js 3D Visualization Foundation
**Status:** Completed
**Files created:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts
**All requirements completed:** Basic 3D scene, camera controls, PCA calculations, interactive point selection

content.text: I'll work on the Advanced Filtering System task. Let me first understand the current codebase structure and create the filtering components.

todos.content: Explore current codebase structure and data models
Create RangeSlider component for numeric filtering
Implement BrandFilter component with search
Create useRacquetFilters hook for state management
Build main RacquetFilters component
Integrate filters with visualizations
Add URL state persistence
Test and verify all filter functionality

# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement advanced filtering capabilities for racquet exploration with multi-dimensional range controls, brand filtering, and dynamic search
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx (new)
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx (new) 
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Advanced Filtering System with:
- Multi-dimensional range sliders (weight, head size, power, control, etc.)
- Brand multi-select with search
- Dynamic search with autocomplete
- Filter persistence and URL state management
- Real-time results updating

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Range sliders for numeric properties (weight, head size, ratings)
- [ ] Multi-select brand filter with search functionality
- [ ] Dynamic text search with autocomplete suggestions
- [ ] Filter state management with custom hook
- [ ] Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- [ ] URL state persistence for filters
- [ ] Clear/reset filters functionality

## After Completion
Next task will be: "Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis"

- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx
- src/lib/utils/pca-calculator.ts

# Next Priority Task

## Current Task: Advanced Filtering System with multi-dimensional controls
**Sprint:** Sprint 2
**Priority:** High
**Description:** Implement advanced filtering capabilities for racquet exploration with multi-dimensional range controls, brand filtering, and dynamic search
**Files involved:** 
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx (new)
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx (new) 
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx (new)
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts (new)

**Estimated time:** 2-3 hours

## Context
Sprint 2 calls for Advanced Filtering System with:
- Multi-dimensional range sliders (weight, head size, power, control, etc.)
- Brand multi-select with search
- Dynamic search with autocomplete
- Filter persistence and URL state management
- Real-time results updating

## Definition of Done
- [x] Range sliders for numeric properties (weight, head size, ratings)
- [x] Multi-select brand filter with search functionality
- [x] Dynamic text search with autocomplete suggestions
- [x] Filter state management with custom hook
- [x] Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- [x] URL state persistence for filters
- [x] Clear/reset filters functionality

## ✅ COMPLETED
**Status:** All filtering functionality implemented and integrated
**Files created:** 
- src/components/filters/RangeSlider.tsx
- src/components/filters/BrandFilter.tsx  
- src/components/filters/RacquetFilters.tsx
- src/components/filters/index.ts
- src/lib/hooks/useRacquetFilters.ts
**Integration:** Filters fully integrated with main page and visualizations

## Next Task: Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis

**Status:** Completed
**Files created:** 
- src/components/visualizations/ThreeScene.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetPoints3D.tsx
- src/components/visualizations/RacquetVisualization3D.tsx

content.text:
Perfect! I have successfully completed the Advanced Filtering System task. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## ✅ Advanced Filtering System - COMPLETED

### Components Created:
1. **RangeSlider.tsx** - Multi-dimensional range controls for numeric properties
2. **BrandFilter.tsx** - Multi-select brand filter with search functionality  
3. **RacquetFilters.tsx** - Main filter component with all controls
4. **useRacquetFilters.ts** - Custom hook for filter state management

### Features Implemented:
- ✅ Range sliders for weight, head size, power, control, comfort ratings
- ✅ Multi-select brand filter with search and autocomplete
- ✅ Dynamic text search across racquet properties
- ✅ URL state persistence for all filters
- ✅ Real-time results updating
- ✅ Clear/reset filters functionality
- ✅ Integration with both 2D and 3D visualizations
- ✅ Filter state management with custom hook

### Integration:
- Fully integrated into the main page with sidebar layout
- Connected to visualization components
- URL state persistence working
- Development server running successfully on port 3001

The next task is ready: **Racquet Comparison Feature with side-by-side analysis**
